final_answer: Action may not proceed. REL-AST-081 confirms PO-AST-081, quantity band, facility and controls but omits explicit abstract hazard-control status required by STD-AST-081-P. WARN-AST-081 flags the exact defect. Boundary remains open; escalate for closure evidence before execution.
